field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Read/Write, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding, Resource Estimate
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
W, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of W,
V, 0x18, 32, W, Data signal of V,
W_down, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of W_down,
x_batch, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of x_batch,
out_batch_1, 0x30, 32, W, Data signal of out_batch,
out_batch_2, 0x34, 32, W, Data signal of out_batch,
down_quant_mode, 0x3c, 32, W, Data signal of down_quant_mode,
x_scale, 0x44, 32, W, Data signal of x_scale,

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info
table.column: s_axi_CTRL, register, offset, name=out_batch_1 offset=0x30 range=32
s_axi_CTRL, register, offset, name=out_batch_2 offset=0x34 range=32

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Direction, Length, Width, Loop, Loop Location
HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: out_batch, swiglu.cpp:490:5, write, Widen Fail, , anonymous, swiglu.cpp:490:5, 214-353, Could not widen since type float size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
out_batch, swiglu.cpp:490:5, write, Inferred, 2048, anonymous, swiglu.cpp:490:5, ,

Pragma.options: mode=m_axi port=W bundle=gmem_W offset=slave depth=9437184 max_read_burst_length=256 latency=64 num_read_outstanding=16 DATA_WIDTH=
mode=m_axi port=V bundle=gmem_V offset=slave depth=9437184 max_read_burst_length=256 latency=64 num_read_outstanding=16 DATA_WIDTH=
mode=m_axi port=W_down bundle=gmem_Wd offset=slave depth=13762560 max_read_burst_length=256 latency=64 num_read_outstanding=16 DATA_WIDTH=
mode=m_axi port=x_batch bundle=gmem_x offset=slave depth=2048 max_read_burst_length=256 latency=64 num_read_outstanding=16 DATA_WIDTH=
mode=m_axi port=out_batch bundle=gmem_out offset=slave depth=2048 max_write_burst_length=256 latency=64 num_write_outstanding=16
